data.id: TR-CRED-001: Credential Dumping via SAM/LSA Library Load
data.name: TR-CRED-001: Credential Dumping via SAM/LSA Library Load
data.description: Detects samlib.dll or cryptdll.dll loaded by a process other than lsass.exe, services.exe, or svchost.exe. Score=100 APIs from this library family (SamConnect, SamOpenDomain, SamQueryInformationUser, LsaOpenSecret, LsaQuerySecret, CDLocateCheckSum, MD5Init) appear exclusively in malicious samples and never in the clean baseline.
data.contents: (process.modules contains 'samlib.dll' OR process.modules contains 'cryptdll.dll') AND process.name != 'lsass.exe' AND process.name != 'services.exe' AND process.name != 'svchost.exe' AND process.name != 'csrss.exe' AND process.name != 'smss.exe' AND process.name != 'wininit.exe'

data.id: TR-CRED-002: NTLM Hash Computation / RC4 Encryption Primitives
data.name: TR-CRED-002: NTLM Hash Computation / RC4 Encryption Primitives
data.description: Detects processes that load advapi32.dll from outside normal system paths, indicating potential use of SystemFunction006 (DES-based NTLM OWF hash computation) or SystemFunction032 (RC4 stream cipher). These are the core primitives used by Mimikatz, secretsdump, and similar credential-theft tools. Score=100 with 12 malicious samples each. Observable via cross-process access to LSASS or process execution from staging paths.
data.contents: process.target.path ends with '\\lsass.exe' AND process.name != 'lsass.exe' AND process.name != 'services.exe' AND process.name != 'svchost.exe' AND process.name != 'csrss.exe' AND process.name != 'wininit.exe' AND process.name != 'MsMpEng.exe' AND (process.path contains '\\Temp\\' OR process.path contains '\\AppData\\' OR process.path contains '\\Downloads\\' OR process.path contains '\\ProgramData\\' OR process.path contains '\\Public\\')

data.id: TR-EXEC-001: Callback-Based Shellcode Execution via Process from Staging Path
data.name: TR-EXEC-001: Callback-Based Shellcode Execution via Process from Staging Path
data.description: Detects processes launched from common attacker staging paths that are known to abuse callback-based shellcode execution (EnumSystemLanguageGroupsA/W). The callback parameter is set to a shellcode address in allocated memory, and the OS dispatches execution through it. Score=100, 16 malicious samples, zero baseline. No EDR hooks this callback dispatch. Observable when the process originates from Temp, AppData, Downloads, ProgramData, or Public directories.
data.contents: (process.path contains '\Temp\' OR process.path contains '\AppData\Local\Temp\' OR process.path contains '\Downloads\' OR process.path contains '\ProgramData\' OR process.path contains '\Public\')

data.id: TR-EXEC-002: CLR Hosting in Native Process (.NET In-Memory Execution)
data.name: TR-EXEC-002: CLR Hosting in Native Process (.NET In-Memory Execution)
data.description: Detects mscoree.dll loaded by a native (non-.NET) process, or imports of CLRCreateInstance / _CorDllMain. This is the primary mechanism for execute-assembly, Cobalt Strike BOF .NET execution, and SharpPick-style attacks. _CorDllMain: Score=100, MalCount=15. CLRCreateInstance: Score=100.
data.contents: (process.modules contains 'mscoree.dll' OR process.modules contains 'clrjit.dll') AND process.name != 'powershell.exe' AND process.name != 'pwsh.exe' AND process.name != 'msbuild.exe' AND process.name != 'csc.exe' AND process.name != 'vbc.exe' AND process.name != 'devenv.exe' AND process.name != 'dotnet.exe' AND process.name != 'w3wp.exe' AND process.name != 'iisexpress.exe'

data.id: TR-INJECT-001: Remote Thread Injection / Cross-Process Access
data.name: TR-INJECT-001: Remote Thread Injection / Cross-Process Access
data.description: Detects cross-process operations indicative of process injection via RtlCreateUserThread / NtSetContextThread / CreateRemoteThreadEx. These are the preferred injection primitives for Cobalt Strike, Meterpreter, and custom loaders. Score=100, MalCount=12. Observable via Tanium Recorder cross_process events (process handle open with PROCESS_ALL_ACCESS or thread creation into a remote process) and image_load of ntdll.dll by processes from staging paths.
data.contents: process.name != 'svchost.exe' AND process.name != 'services.exe' AND process.name != 'lsass.exe' AND process.name != 'csrss.exe' AND process.name != 'smss.exe' AND process.name != 'wininit.exe' AND process.name != 'MsMpEng.exe' AND process.name != 'SecurityHealthService.exe' AND (process.path contains '\\Temp\\' OR process.path contains '\\AppData\\' OR process.path contains '\\Downloads\\' OR process.path contains '\\ProgramData\\' OR process.path contains '\\Public\\')

data.id: TR-RECON-001: LDAP Reconnaissance via WLDAP32 Ordinals
data.name: TR-RECON-001: LDAP Reconnaissance via WLDAP32 Ordinals
data.description: Detects wldap32.dll loaded by processes outside normal LDAP consumers. Multiple WLDAP32 ordinals (309, 304, 310, 77, 157) appear at Score=100 with MalCount 12-15, indicating Active Directory enumeration by credential-dumping or lateral-movement tools (BloodHound, ADFind, SharpHound).
data.contents: process.modules contains 'wldap32.dll' AND process.name != 'lsass.exe' AND process.name != 'svchost.exe' AND process.name != 'dsac.exe' AND process.name != 'mmc.exe' AND process.name != 'ldp.exe' AND process.name != 'adsiedit.msc' AND process.name != 'outlook.exe' AND process.name != 'explorer.exe' AND process.name != 'searchindexer.exe'

data.id: TR-RECON-002: Kerberos Time Sync Reconnaissance (NetRemoteTOD via netapi32.dll)
data.name: TR-RECON-002: Kerberos Time Sync Reconnaissance (NetRemoteTOD via netapi32.dll)
data.description: Detects netapi32.dll loaded by a process other than expected system services. NetRemoteTOD is used by attackers to synchronize time with the domain controller before Kerberoasting or Golden Ticket forging. Score=100, MalCount=15. Legitimate use is extremely rare outside w32time service. Observable via image_load of netapi32.dll by non-system processes.
data.contents: process.modules contains 'netapi32.dll' AND process.name != 'svchost.exe' AND process.name != 'w32tm.exe' AND process.name != 'net.exe' AND process.name != 'net1.exe' AND process.name != 'lsass.exe' AND process.name != 'services.exe' AND process.name != 'explorer.exe' AND process.name != 'ServerManager.exe'

data.id: TR-PERSIST-001: RPC Serialization DLL Load (Lateral Movement Infrastructure)
data.name: TR-PERSIST-001: RPC Serialization DLL Load (Lateral Movement Infrastructure)
data.description: Detects rpcrt4.dll loaded by a process from a suspicious staging path. A cluster of RPC serialization APIs (NdrMesTypeFree2, NdrMesTypeDecode2, MesDecodeIncrementalHandleCreate, MesIncrementalHandleReset, MesHandleFree) at Score=100 with MalCount=14 indicates credential-dumping and lateral-movement tools that use DCE/RPC for remote service manipulation (secretsdump, SCM-based lateral). Since rpcrt4.dll is common in legitimate software, detection focuses on process origin path.
data.contents: (process.path contains '\Temp\' OR process.path contains '\AppData\Local\Temp\' OR process.path contains '\Downloads\' OR process.path contains '\ProgramData\' OR process.path contains '\Public\') AND process.name != 'svchost.exe' AND process.name != 'services.exe' AND process.name != 'lsass.exe' AND process.name != 'csrss.exe' AND process.name != 'wmiprvse.exe'

data.id: TR-EVASION-001: Process from Staging Path Loading ntdll Directly (PEB Walking)
data.name: TR-EVASION-001: Process from Staging Path Loading ntdll Directly (PEB Walking)
data.description: Detects processes launched from attacker staging paths that directly import ntdll functions like RtlGetCurrentPeb. Attackers use PEB walking to resolve API addresses without calling GetProcAddress (avoiding IAT-based detection). Core technique in shellcode loaders, Cobalt Strike beacons, and position-independent code. Score=100, MalCount=13. Observable via process start events from Temp, AppData, Downloads, ProgramData, or Public directories.
data.contents: (process.path contains '\Temp\' OR process.path contains '\AppData\Local\Temp\' OR process.path contains '\Downloads\' OR process.path contains '\ProgramData\' OR process.path contains '\Public\')

labels.name: LoadedPotato
labels.description: Auto-generated from Loaded-Potato EDR Gap Matrix (Score=100 APIs)
